data.title: Global AI Deploys Enterprise Agentic AI Platform with Major European Insurer
data.description: Validation of platform execution through enterprise deployment in regulated markets has been confirmed, bolstering the opportunity for expansion into various markets. This successful deployment emphasizes the platform's effectiveness and paves the way for growth. The number of regulated markets served has increased, demonstrating the platform's adaptability and viability. This achievement sets the stage for further expansion and solidifies the platform's position as a reliable solution for diverse market needs.

data.title: Tether achieves milestone with $184B stablecoin audit by Big Four, moving from attestations as USDT market cap soars.
data.description: Tether has recently secured the services of a prominent Big Four accounting firm to conduct its initial comprehensive independent audit. This move signifies a shift from previous attestations. Concurrently, the market capitalization for USDT, the stablecoin associated with Tether, has surged to reach an impressive $184 billion.

data.title: Meta introduces TRIBE v2, an AI model trained on 700+ subjects, predicting human brain activity. #neuroscience #AI
data.description: Meta has unveiled TRIBE v2, an AI foundation model crafted on a dataset encompassing 700+ subjects. This advanced model has the capability to generate digital replicas of human neural reactions to visual and audio stimuli.

data.title: Cambium Networks Announces Nasdaq Delisting
data.description: In Hoffman Estates, Illinois, on March 26, 2026, Cambium Networks Corporation, a prominent networking solutions provider (NASDAQ: CMBM), disclosed receiving a notice from the Nasdaq Hearings Panel on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Can-Fite Reports 2025 Financial Results and Ongoing Clinical Progress Highlighting Positive Data in Phase 2a Pancreatic cancer and 9 Years Cancer-Free Survival in Liver Cancer Patient
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Ramat Gan, Israel, Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd. released updates on their clinical progress and financial performance for the year ended December 31, 2025, and the beginning of 2026. The company, listed on NYSE American as CANF and on TASE as CANF, specializes in developing small molecule drugs for oncological and inflammatory conditions. This announcement signifies their commitment to advancing innovative treatments in these areas.
